title: arum orientale subsp. besserianum
intro: Arum orientale subsp. besserianum, also known as the Dragon's Blood Lily, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Arum. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Arum orientale subsp. besserianum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through various methods, including decoction, infusion, and powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
